mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT receiver_name, receiver_phone, shipping_address FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND receiver_name IS NOT NULL AND receiver_name != '' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET receiver_name = #{receiverName}, receiver_phone = #{receiverPhone}, shipping_address = #{shippingAddress}, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, product_id, product_name, product_price, quantity, subtotal) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productPrice}, #{quantity}, #{subtotal})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM order_items WHERE order_id IN
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET total_amount = #{totalAmount} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId}
